submodule.head_subject: fix(indexing): retry_rate counts only same-tool calls after an error (#753 Bug 1) (#874)

canonical_active_source: roo-config/settings/servers.json (13 servers, consumed by run-diagnostic.ps1, maintenance-workflow.ps1, deployment/README.md + 7 more)

staleness.metric: git -C mcps/internal log -1 --format=%cs (submodule-own git commit-date, canonical)
staleness.caveat: All 239 .md show last-commit 2026-07-01 (uniform) because the submodule's main branch is a FRESH-ROOT REBUILD from 2026-07-01 (root commit 2c7726a3, parent=[]). This is the actual git commit-date (NOT filesystem mtime), verified 3 ways (one-pass %cs, one-pass %as, slow per-file). Commit-date staleness is therefore DEGENERATE/uninformative for this submodule — 0 stale reflects the rebuild date, not content age. Content genuinely predates main on non-canonical refs (git log --all reaches fa4f9cce initial commit 2025-05-01; origin/backup-pre-merge-f724301 2025-10-14 shows quickfiles README last touched 2025-10-14), but that history is not on deployed main/origin/HEAD. Structural status (active/superseded/retired/undocumented) is the operative signal. See MD 'Reconciliation with po-204 c.111' for the 3rd-party review that flagged this and the parent-repo-gitlog methodological clarification.

servers.name: github-projects-mcp
servers.status_proof: 0 references in canonical settings/servers.json (13 servers) + CLAUDE.md '.claude/rules/tool-availability.md' lists under 'Retires: desktop-commander, github-projects-mcp, quickfiles'. Source + README still present in submodule (historical).
servers.finding: Retired from active config but source+docs still in submodule (12 .md incl. DEBUG guides, mission_report). README does not mark as retired. NOTE: W8 DoD literal removal-proof criterion ('server absent de mcps/internal/servers/ OU package.json workspaces') is NOT met — server dir IS still present + no workspaces field — so README removal alone is NOT justified (would leave undocumented orphan code).
servers.action: FLAG (retired-from-config, source-still-present). README-deprecation header is safe; full server removal (source+docs) = separate user-gated decommission (no-deletion-without-proof + retired-server decommission is owner-gated).

servers.name: quickfiles-server

servers.finding: Retired from active config (canonical settings/) but 29 .md + source still in submodule. Same caveat as github-projects-mcp: dir still present so README-only removal unsafe. Bonus finding: stale starter template config-templates/servers.json still references quickfiles (should be cleaned, separate from W8).
servers.action: FLAG (retired-from-config, source-still-present). Same handling as github-projects-mcp.

destructive_actions_this_cycle: NONE (report-only). All removals/deprecations deferred to ai-01 / user arbitration (no-deletion-without-proof + retired-server decommission is owner-gated).
